channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: 'They're building each other': new X1 Neo robot video shows the humanoids assisting in the robot production process, just as all science fiction foretold
item.description: 1X releases new Neo Home Robot production video that puts the robots to work — building themselves.

item.title: Sources: Anthropic potential $900B+ valuation round could happen within 2 weeks
item.description: Anthropic is asking investors to submit allocations for the AI company’s latest fundraise within the next 48 hours, according to sources familiar with the matter.

item.title: Good Luck Getting a Mac Mini for the Next ‘Several Months’
item.description: Apple CEO Tim Cook told analysts that AI adoption has happened faster than expected.

item.title: Quordle hints and answers for Friday, May 1 (game #1558)
item.description: Looking for Quordle clues? We can help. Plus get the answers to Quordle today and past solutions.

item.title: NYT Connections hints and answers for Friday, May 1 (game #1055)
item.description: Looking for NYT Connections answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, plus my commentary on the puzzles.

item.title: NYT Strands hints and answers for Friday, May 1 (game #789)
item.description: Looking for NYT Strands answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, including the spangram.

item.title: The craziest part of Musk v. Altman happened while the jury was out of the room
item.description: Okay, I am not a lawyer so I only understood about half of what just happened. But I am fairly sure, given the context, that Elon Musk's lawyers may have just fucked up big. Jared "James Brickhouse" Birchall, Musk's finance guy and all-around fixer, took the stand after Musk today. Most of his testimony was […]

item.title: Apple was surprised by AI-driven demand for Macs
item.description: Apple said it will be supply-constrained on Mac mini, Studio, and Neo in the next quarter, too.

item.title: Google says it is ‘proud’ to serve the Pentagon – new DoD contract expansion says Gemini will only be used for ‘any lawful purpose’, but what happened to 'Don’t Be Evil'?
item.description: Google's contract with the Pentagon allows the DoD to use Gemini for 'any lawful purpose', and that is a big ethical concern.

item.title: The first Tesla Semi finally rolls off the production line — 7 years after Elon Musk unveiled the long-haul EVs
item.description: It might be seven years later than planned, but the first Tesla Semi truck rolls off the mass production line

item.title: Chipotle’s new brand chief gave fast-food burgers buzz. Now he’s coming for fast-casual burritos
item.description: Fernando Machado is best known for his stunt-driven Burger King work. Will his irreverence find success at Chipotle? Chipotle Mexican Grill needed to do something. In February, the fast-casual restaurant brand reported that traffic to its restaurants fell for the fourth straight quarter to end 2025, and it was projecting flat same-store sales growth for 2026. At that point, the company’s stock had dipped by about 33% over the last year. ...

item.title: This $22 8-in-1 cable simplifies charging on the go
item.description: Get the GoCable 8-in-1 100W charging cable for $22 and power multiple devices with one compact, travel-friendly tool.
